message:
fix(obligation,eprocess): prevent integer overflow and enforce config validation

marking.rs: Use saturating_add for all u32 counters in ObligationMarking
and AnalysisStats to prevent overflow panics in debug mode and silent
wrapping in release. Affects increment(), total_pending(),
region_pending(), and all stats counters.

eprocess.rs: Add debug_assert for EProcessConfig::validate() in
EProcess::new() to catch invalid configs (p0=0.0, alpha=0.0) early
rather than producing silently useless monitors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
